title: A Bacteriophage Capsid Protein Is an Inhibitor of a Conserved Transcription Terminator of Various Bacterial Pathogens
summary: Bacteriophage P4's capsid protein Psu inhibits the transcription terminator Rho in various bacterial pathogens, including Gram-negative and Gram-positive species, by obstructing ATPase and translocase activities.

extra.protein_psu_function: inhibits Rho by obstructing ATPase and translocase activities
extra.protein_psu_structure: α-helical protein with a solvent-exposed flexible C-terminal domain (CTD) and an N-terminal domain (NTD)
extra.protein_psu_binding: binds with Rho proteins from various bacterial species
extra.protein_psu_effect: induces lethality in Mycobacterium and Xanthomonas species by antagonizing Rho
